text:
Where does church revitalization play itself out in relation to the working of the Holy Spirit? Scripture teaches the Holy Spirit is the dominant Spirit in any church renewal effort and therefore leadership in any church will have to cooperate with Him in His efforts to revive and revitalize their churches. The Spirit gives these leaders His empowerment to function as His tools to accomplish His purpose of the revitalization of His churches.

This discussion starts by defining spiritual empowerment using a brief survey of biblical illustrations followed by an exploration of the psychological and theological dynamics involved in empowering church leaders. It then considers various ways in which declining churches can be revitalized before summarizing in several key indicators of biblical empowerment that provide indices of a Spirit-empowered local church.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
